metadata.title: Quantum Shield - Protect Your Assets with Quantum-Resistant Cryptography
metadata.description: The world's first quantum-resistant cryptographic bridge combining Dilithium-III and ZK-STARK. Protect your assets from future threats, today.

hero.title: Digital Asset Protection for the
hero.subtitle: The world's first quantum-resistant cryptographic bridge combining Dilithium-III and ZK-STARK. Protect your assets from future threats, today.

dilithium.title: Dilithium-III Cryptography
dilithium.description: Government-approved 'next-generation key'. Current passwords may be broken by future quantum computers, but this technology keeps you safe.
dilithium.tooltip: Dilithium is a new cryptographic technology that even quantum computers cannot crack. The US government officially certified it in 2024 as the standard to use. Protected by advanced mathematics, your assets remain secure for the future.

timeLock.title: Time Lock Protection
timeLock.description: 24-hour waiting period for withdrawals gives you time to respond if unauthorized access occurs.
timeLock.tooltip: Why wait 24 hours? Even if someone gains unauthorized access to your account, they cannot immediately steal your assets. During the 24 hours, you can notice and cancel, preventing 'too late by the time you notice' scenarios.

zkStark.title: ZK-STARK Verification
zkStark.description: Prove authenticity without revealing secrets. Maintain privacy while allowing anyone to verify transaction correctness.
zkStark.tooltip: ZK-STARK is an almost magical technology that 'proves while keeping secrets'. For example, you can prove you know the correct password without showing it. It's also safe against quantum computers.

selfCustody.title: Self-Custody
selfCustody.description: You alone control your assets. Private keys are generated and stored locally, never sent to servers.

emergency.title: Emergency Recovery
emergency.description: Peace of mind even if you lose your private key. A safety net that allows asset recovery with a 7-day waiting period and bond.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: All transactions are verifiable on-chain. Open source and audited smart contracts.

step1.title: Generate Keys
step1.description: Connect your wallet and generate a Dilithium key pair. Your private key is stored only on your device.

step2.title: Lock Assets
step2.description: Lock ETH or ERC-20 tokens in the quantum-resistant vault. They cannot be withdrawn without a Dilithium signature.

step3.title: Unlock Safely
step3.description: Request unlock with your Dilithium signature. After a 24-hour Time Lock, assets safely return to your wallet.

cta.title: Prepare for the Quantum Era
cta.description: Protect your assets from "harvest now, decrypt later" attacks. Start preparing for future threats today.

brand.description: Digital asset protection for the quantum computing era. Safeguarding your assets from future threats with NIST-certified cryptography.
